Package org.apache.juneau.http.header

Class HttpMediaRangesHeader

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.http.header.HttpHeaderBean
org.apache.juneau.http.header.HttpMediaRangesHeader
All Implemented Interfaces:
HttpHeader
Direct Known Subclasses:
Accept
public class HttpMediaRangesHeader extends HttpHeaderBean
Base type for headers whose wire format is an Accept-style list of media ranges.

Beta — API subject to change: This type is part of the next-generation REST client and HTTP stack (org.apache.juneau.marshall.ng.*). It is not API-frozen: binary- and source-incompatible changes may appear in the next major Juneau release (and possibly earlier).

See Also:
  • juneau-ng REST client
Since:
9.2.1

    static final int
    LAZY_MEDIA_RANGES
    Lazy supplier provides MediaRanges (re-evaluated on each access).

    Lazy supplier provides the wire string.

  • Field Details

    • LAZY_WIRE_STRING

      public static final int LAZY_WIRE_STRING
      Lazy supplier provides the wire string.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

      public static final int LAZY_MEDIA_RANGES
      Lazy supplier provides MediaRanges (re-evaluated on each access).
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Constructor Details

    • HttpMediaRangesHeader

      protected HttpMediaRangesHeader(String name, String value)
      Parameters:
      name - Header name. Must not be null.
      value - Wire value. May be null.

    • HttpMediaRangesHeader

      protected HttpMediaRangesHeader(String name, MediaRanges value)
      Parameters:
      name - Header name. Must not be null.
      value - Parsed media ranges. May be null.

    • HttpMediaRangesHeader

      protected HttpMediaRangesHeader(String name, Supplier<?> supplier, int lazyMode)
      Parameters:
      name - Header name. Must not be null.
      supplier - Lazy supplier; mode LAZY_WIRE_STRING or LAZY_MEDIA_RANGES. Must not be null.
      lazyMode - Discriminator for erasure-safe lazy construction.

  • Method Details

    • asMediaRanges

      public Optional<MediaRanges> asMediaRanges()
      Returns:
      Parsed MediaRanges, or null if the wire value is absent.

    • getRange

      public MediaRange getRange(int index)
      Parameters:
      index - Range index.
      Returns:
      The MediaRange at index, or null if out of range.

    • hasSubtypePart

      public boolean hasSubtypePart(String part)
      Parameters:
      part - Subtype fragment to find (e.g. "activity" for text/json+activity).
      Returns:
      true if any range's subtype contains the fragment.

    • match

      public int match(List<? extends MediaType> mediaTypes)
      Parameters:
      mediaTypes - Candidate types, in preference order.
      Returns:
      Index of the best matching type, or -1.

    • orElse

      public MediaRanges orElse(MediaRanges other)
      Parameters:
      other - Fallback when no parsed value is present.
      Returns:
      Parsed ranges or other.

    • toMediaRanges

      public MediaRanges toMediaRanges()
      Returns:
      Parsed MediaRanges, or null if the wire value is absent.
